description: Style Notedunhill's 51.3N comes in champagne gold coloring, in a classic flacon. The very popular English actor Henry Cavill is the face of the fragrance. It was launched in 2009. Product DetailsThe top notes rhubarb, grapefruit and ozone middle notes are ink and black pepper, lavender and cedar base notes are sandalwood and vanilla.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize100 ml
